Title: Verify User Creation
Preconditions: User opens the application and navigates to the registration screen.
Test Data: Valid email, password, username, and points.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email, password, username, and points.
2. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered, and the account is created in the database.

Title: Verify Empty Fields Validation
Preconditions: User opens the application and navigates to the registration screen.
Test Data: Empty email, password, username, or points.
Test Steps:
1. Leave one or more fields empty.
2. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

Title: Verify User Login
Preconditions: User has a registered account and navigates to the login screen.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and password.
2. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in, and the application navigates to the main screen.

Title: Verify Invalid Login
Preconditions: User navigates to the login screen.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email or password.
2. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to log in.

Title: Verify User Data Update
Test Data: Updated email, password, username, or points.
Test Steps: 1. Update user data in the database.
Expected Result: The user's data is successfully updated in the database.

Title: Verify Ranking Creation
Test Data: Valid task title, superated status, and user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Create a new ranking with valid data.
Expected Result: The ranking is successfully created and associated with the user.

Title: Verify Ranking Update
Test Data: Updated task title, superated status, or user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Update a ranking in the database.
Expected Result: The ranking is successfully updated in the database.

Title: Verify Tip Creation
Test Data: Valid tip title, description, and user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Create a new tip with valid data.
Expected Result: The tip is successfully created and associated with the user.

Title: Verify Tip Update
Test Data: Updated tip title, description, or user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Update a tip in the database.
Expected Result: The tip is successfully updated in the database.

Title: Verify Mission Creation
Test Data: Valid mission title, superated status, description, and user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Create a new mission with valid data.
Expected Result: The mission is successfully created and associated with the user.

Title: Verify Mission Update
Test Data: Updated mission title, superated status, description, or user ID.
Test Steps: 1. Update a mission in the database.
Expected Result: The mission is successfully updated in the database.

Title: Verify Firebase Authentication
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to sign in with valid email and password.
Expected Result: The user is successfully authenticated and logged in.

Title: Verify Realtime Database Data Update
Test Steps: 1. Update data in the realtime database.
Expected Result: The data is successfully updated in the realtime database.
